title: DEAMON´s necessary FABRIC Client Things
description:
This is the Client-Side Version.
It gives a Huge Performance Boost and Many Visual and QoL Changes with Loads of Features, Structures,...
body:
This modpack is the client-side version of my modpack!
The Modpack contains the mods that are needed to play on the server, that uses my server version. Also, mods that weren't that relevant were removed, to keep the modpack from being too big (even though that didn't have that big an impact xd)

This modpack revamps Minecraft almost completely, giving the player much more control and a more immersive experience, making it feel and look like Minecraft came out just a few years ago!

The modpack contains tons of new structures, a few new biomes and updated vanilla biomes. There are also lots of vanilla mob variants and loads of furnishings.
Bosses and new mobs as well as dungeons make you want to explore a new world with lots of adventures!

Sorry for the key bindings, it's pure chaos because there are so many mods. But luckily you can leave most of them empty.


You have a Server? Check out my [Server-Side Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/deamons-necessary-fabric-server-things)!
You can also check out the NEW UPDATED 1.21.1 [full Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/deamons-necessary-fabric-things)!

# Mods not working

- let me know

# Known Bugs

- This isnt a bug but, *DONT UPDATE ANYTHING* _unless it says so_

If you found a Bug, need help or just want to chat you can join my Server on Discord! (The server is not completed)
